title: TimeseriesResult
description: A single timeseries result for a query formula

query_index.description: Index of the query or formula that produced this result

unit.description: Unit information for the metric values in this series

family.description: The unit family (e.g., time, bytes, percent)

name.description: The unit name (e.g., second, byte, percent)

group_tags.description: The tag key:value pairs that identify this series within a group-by

values.description: The numeric values at each timestamp
